title: BEM-1153 testing assignment
objective:
Create file governance/runners/testing_contour_assignment.py with content import json

DEFAULT_ASSIGNMENT = {"mock_e2e": "C1", "validator_tests": "C2", "release_proof_tests": "C3"}


def assign(test_type):
    contour = DEFAULT_ASSIGNMENT.get(test_type)
    if not contour:
        return {"ok": False, "error": "unknown test_type"}
    return {"ok": True, "test_type": test_type, "contour": contour}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    result = assign(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "")
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
